title: *** Modpack
description:
Super Extra Xtreme Modpack.
Modpack with a variety of adventure, magic and tech mods made for 1.19.2 with an emphasis on fun and multiplayer gameplay over individual stability or balance.
body:
This is a modpack I and a couple of friends developed, with configurations, coding, and a part of the design done by yours truly, and a good chunk of design brainstormed and developed in the group of friends.

This modpack will focus primarily on exploration and advancements. Grinding, farming, and developing of one's base will also be a primary focus, integrating many elements of create, and its expansion, as well as mods such as AE2 and ars noveau to maintain a well-rounded sense to the gameplay.

This modpack has been designed to be played with friends, as such, the individual player experience has not been focused on as much, meaning that on the contrary, the multiplayer experience has been based on the idea of collaboration, by this I mean that each player developing a single mod to the extremes is the way to go, and by joining the efforts of many players, a total domination of the resource generation this mod provides is fully possible in a shorter than average amount of time.
